modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Strange links appearing in email messages.

full_description_text:  
User is seeing long links in their email. They are concerned about the safety of clicking these links. The links appear to be from safelinks.protection.outlook.com. User wants to know if these links are safe to click.
short_description: Strange links appearing in email messages.
description: User is seeing long links in their email. They are concerned about the safety of clicking these links. The links appear to be from safelinks.protection.outlook.com. User wants to know if these links are safe to click.
